A_math_critique.pheromone_deposit: tanh(relu(Delta)) is robust to outliers but saturates quickly; use scaling (Delta/sigma) or softplus-based mapping to preserve dynamic range.
A_math_critique.death_respawn: High death rates early remove signal; recommend longer death_streak or warm-start exemptions. Consider probabilistic respawn from a diversity pool to avoid monoculture.
A_math_critique.taint_dynamics: Taint updates are currently aggressive; add symmetric decay and smaller per-update increments so recovery is possible.
A_math_critique.leader_utility: EMA on leader utility is conceptually correct but must track meaningful Delta (ensure Delta computed from scorer differences).

route_aggregate_hidden_zero.description: route_aggregate called with hidden vector of zeros — graph weighting uses no semantic signal. Fix: pass real encoder hidden states.'

phi_init_on_empty_slots.description: phi initialized to phi_init even for EMPTY_SLOT; counts as non-empty signal. Fix: phi should be 0 for empty slots or track active flags separately.

batch_aggregation.description: Ant deltas and some computations used only batch_idx=0 earlier; aggregation across batch is necessary.

tensor_transfers.description: Repeated to_cpu transfers and cloning increase host+device memory. Streamline via single transfer and views.

prune_and_deposit_balance.description: Deposit uses saturated tanh; pruning thresholds may be too aggressive relative to deposit scale.

C_experiments.name: RouteAggregate Sanity
C_experiments.cmd: insert assertion after route_aggregate to verify non-zero outputs; run one train step
C_experiments.expected: If hidden passed correctly, route weights show variance; otherwise zeros confirm bug

C_experiments.name: Pheromone Mapping Test
C_experiments.cmd: log Delta distribution and plot tanh(Delta) vs Delta; try tanh(Delta/sigma) with sigma as running stddev
C_experiments.expected: Normalized deposit uses full dynamic range

C_experiments.name: Death Rate Ablation
C_experiments.cmd: increase death_streak to 10 and run short 200-step trial
C_experiments.expected: Less pruning, higher edge survival, better initial graph formation

C_experiments.name: Batch Aggregation Validation
C_experiments.cmd: enable full-batch colony use then measure ant_delta variance across batch items
C_experiments.expected: Aggregate deltas increase signal-to-noise and stabilise pheromone updates

D_priorities.fix: reduce tensor cloning and streamline GPU↔CPU bridge
